ETVapp 0.4.3
    • External calibration (ExtCal) workflow
    • External gas calibration (ExtGasCal) workflow
    • Isotope dilution mass spectrometry (IDMS) workflow
    • On-line isotope dilution mass spectrometry (oIDMS) workflow
  • Reference

Calculate an isotope ratio based on peak areas.

Source: R/get_isoratio.R
get_isoratio.Rd

Calculate an isotope ratio based on peak areas.

Usage

get_isoratio(
  data,
  iso1_col,
  iso2_col,
  PPmethod = c("Peak (height)", "Peak (manual)"),
  peak_start,
  peak_end,
  minpeakheight = 1000,
  BLmethod = c("modpolyfit", "none"),
  deg = 1,
  cf = 50,
  fl = 5
)

Arguments

data

A data.frame containing at least two columns or a list of such data.frames in which case the result will be a list of data frames as well.

iso1_col

Spike isotope.

iso2_col

Sample isotope.

PPmethod

Peak picking method.

peak_start

Value which is taken as peak start point, when manual peak picking is chosen.

peak_end

Value which is taken as peak end point, when manual peak picking is chosen.

minpeakheight

A threshold value for peak picking when "Peak (height)" is choosen as an option.

BLmethod

Method for baseline correction.

deg

Degree of polynomial for baseline correction.

cf

A correction value for cutting the area around the detected peak.

fl

Filter length of smoothing function, has to be odd integer >=3.

Value

A data.frame or a list of data.frames when data is a list itself.

Details

Time-resolved ICP-MS data will be integrated and optionally baseline corrected. Peak boundaries will be checked regarding the similarity between the isotopes.

Examples

# for sample measurements
td <- ETVapp::ETVapp_testdata[["IDMS"]]
lapply(td, function(x) {
  print(ldply_base(1:length(x), function(i) {
    get_isoratio(
     x[[i]], iso1_col = "113Cd", iso2_col = "111Cd", PPmethod = "Peak (manual)",
     peak_start = 72, peak_end = 132
    )
  }))
})
#>   Spike isotope Sample isotope      R_m
#> 1         113Cd          111Cd 1.349456
#> 2         113Cd          111Cd 1.660122
#> 3         113Cd          111Cd 1.653288
#>   Spike isotope Sample isotope       R_m
#> 1         113Cd          111Cd 1.0092857
#> 2         113Cd          111Cd 0.9942728
#> 3         113Cd          111Cd 1.0042879
#>   Spike isotope Sample isotope      R_m
#> 1         113Cd          111Cd 1.349456
#> 2         113Cd          111Cd 1.660122
#> 3         113Cd          111Cd 1.653288
#> $Blanks
#>   Spike isotope Sample isotope      R_m
#> 1         113Cd          111Cd 1.349456
#> 2         113Cd          111Cd 1.660122
#> 3         113Cd          111Cd 1.653288
#> 
#> $Massbias
#>   Spike isotope Sample isotope       R_m
#> 1         113Cd          111Cd 1.0092857
#> 2         113Cd          111Cd 0.9942728
#> 3         113Cd          111Cd 1.0042879
#> 
#> $Samples
#>   Spike isotope Sample isotope      R_m
#> 1         113Cd          111Cd 1.349456
#> 2         113Cd          111Cd 1.660122
#> 3         113Cd          111Cd 1.653288
#> 
td <- ETVapp::ETVapp_testdata[["IDMS"]][["Samples"]]
